title: Vanilla+
description: This mod pack contains over 200 mods. Vanilla+ is meant to enhance ALL aspects of the Minecraft experience without modifying the base game and not containing any cheats*, while being allowed on most servers like Hypixel.
body:
This mod pack contains over 200 mods. *I recommend you add and remove mods for a more custom experience.*

Vanilla+ is meant to enhance ALL aspects of the Minecraft experience without modifying the base game, containing any cheats*, and being allowed on most servers like Hypixel.

This Modpack adds mods like **Axiom**, which is used for modifying the Minecraft World in Creative, **Nvidium** and **Bobby**, which is used to increase render distance, and more!

## **Features Include:**

⭐️ **Enhanced Performance** - Enhance your game performance with performance mods like **Sodium** and **Lithium**

👥 **Play with Friends** - With the included **Essential** mod and **e4mc**, invite your friends to your Minecraft world and play together.

💬 **Chat Reporting Transparency** - Mods like **Chat Reporting Helper** and **No Chat Reports** give more control around the chat reporting system.

🩷 **Compatible with Servers** - Built to be compatible with modern Minecraft servers such as Hypixel, MCC Island, and TubNet.

💎 **Shader and Resource Pack Support** - With the included **Iris** and **Puzzle** mods, use all your favorite shaders and resource packs.

✅ **Built for an Optimized Minecraft Experience.**

----------

*Only real "hack/cheat" included is **Freecam** (Modrinth Edition), just remove or disable it if undesired, although **Replay Mod** gives a similar effect already. Also the mod **Perspektive** isn't allowed on some servers as it give you a third person perspective you normally can't gain from vanilla minecraft.*

Contains **Mod Menu Helper.zip** from https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized

----------

The collection was put together by:

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCPOao-7krEepgUuU0BJNrkA

https://beacons.ai/danielfunbro
